locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Serving all major areas in Dubai

cta.title: We Deliver To You
cta.description: No matter where you are in Dubai, we offer complimentary delivery and pickup of your Rolls-Royce rental.

jumeirahPage.title: Rolls-Royce Rental
jumeirahPage.subtitle: Dubai's most prestigious beachfront district. Free delivery to Burj Al Arab, Madinat Jumeirah, and all luxury beach resorts.

landmarks.title: Nearby Landmarks
landmarks.subtitle: We deliver to all Jumeirah landmarks

experiences.title: Jumeirah Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Popular ways to enjoy a Rolls-Royce in Jumeirah

burjArab.title: Burj Al Arab Arrival
burjArab.desc: Make the ultimate entrance at the world's most iconic hotel. Our Rolls-Royce perfectly complements the Burj Al Arab's legendary luxury.

beachRoad.title: Jumeirah Beach Road Cruise
beachRoad.desc: The scenic coastal road from Jumeirah to Dubai Marina offers stunning Gulf views. The Dawn convertible is the perfect choice.

madinat.title: Madinat Jumeirah Dinner
madinat.desc: Arrive at Madinat Jumeirah's award-winning restaurants in a Rolls-Royce. Pierchic, Pai Thai, and Rockfish await.

kiteBeach.title: Kite Beach Sunset
kiteBeach.desc: Experience the golden hour at Kite Beach with a Rolls-Royce parked on the promenade. Perfect for photoshoots.

hotels.title: Hotels We Serve
hotels.subtitle: Free delivery to all Jumeirah hotels

models.title: Available Models
models.subtitle: All models available for delivery to Jumeirah

deiraPage.title: Rolls-Royce Rental
deiraPage.subtitle: Dubai's historic heart. 10 minutes from DXB Airport. Free delivery to Gold Souk, Dubai Creek, and all Deira hotels.

airport.title: Closest to Dubai Airport
airport.desc: Deira is the closest major district to Dubai International Airport (DXB). Your Rolls-Royce can be waiting at the terminal in under 10 minutes. Perfect for VIP arrivals and departures with our meet & greet service.

vip.title: VIP Terminal
vip.desc: Private jet and first class arrivals

landmarks.title: Nearby Landmarks
landmarks.subtitle: We deliver to all Deira landmarks

experiences.title: Deira Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Popular ways to enjoy a Rolls-Royce in Deira

goldSouk.title: Gold Souk & Heritage Tour
goldSouk.desc: Explore the legendary Gold Souk and Spice Souk in a Rolls-Royce. Combine tradition with ultimate luxury on a cultural heritage tour.

creek.title: Dubai Creek Sunset
creek.desc: Drive along the historic Dubai Creek at sunset. The contrast of heritage dhows and modern luxury creates unforgettable memories.

dxb.title: DXB Airport Transfer
dxb.desc: Deira is the closest area to Dubai International Airport. Arrive or depart in style with a VIP Rolls-Royce transfer in under 10 minutes.

oldDubai.title: Old Dubai Night Drive
oldDubai.desc: Experience Old Dubai's charm at night. From Al Seef waterfront to Baniyas Square, the illuminated heritage district is magical.

hotels.subtitle: Free delivery to all Deira hotels
